synopsis: [El-errata] ELSA-2026-1852 Moderate: Oracle Linux 8 util-linux security update
description:
[2.32.1-48.0.1]
- Orabug 35995159 - report lost loop device

[2.32.1-48]
- fix RHEL-134296 - libblkid: use snprintf() instead of sprintf()
- fix RHEL-133946 - login-utils: fix setpwnam() buffer use [CVE-2025-14104]
full_text:
Oracle Linux Security Advisory ELSA-2026-1852

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELSA-2026-1852.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 8 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:

Description of changes:

[2.32.1-48.0.1]
- Orabug 35995159 - report lost loop device

[2.32.1-48]
- fix RHEL-134296 - libblkid: use snprintf() instead of sprintf()
- fix RHEL-133946 - login-utils: fix setpwnam() buffer use [CVE-2025-14104]
